description: Cursor crashes on shutdown requiring daily reinstall
notes: Failed to install cursor update on shutdown — uninstalls itself. User must reinstall every day.

description: Chat becomes unreadable when model presents a question
notes: No way to collapse questions. Confusing UX compared to Codex. Full chat redesign needed.

description: Context compression forgets edits from 2 minutes ago
notes: Not a model bug — compression weights by space occupied not recency. Workaround: shorter sessions.

description: Single prompt consumed 5M tokens in plan mode — API usage jumped 35% to 75%
notes: Triggered by adding MCP server. Same task on Codex used 300k tokens. Suspected bug not feature.

description: wait() resolved before terminal result written — broke CI pipelines
notes: Hydration stopped before run reached final state. Broke headless automation reading partial results.

description: Agent dispose deleted checkpoint blobs incorrectly — silent data loss on teardown
notes: Missing root ref triggered full directory wipe even when checkpoint blobs existed.

description: Cloud sessions failed to stream over HTTP/1.1 — broke proxies and CI images
notes: Streaming assumed HTTP/2. All HTTP/1.1 environments broken silently. Fixed in recent release.

description: .d.ts files referenced unpublished workspace packages — caused TS2305/TS2307 errors
notes: Published types had internal workspace deps. Silent 'any' on stream types.

description: Python SDK list_runs returned spurious agent-not-found errors
notes: Bridge subprocess didn't inherit correct cwd. Fixed in cursor-sdk 0.1.6.

description: Tab completion returning [not_found] on every request — indexing stuck on loading
notes: Every request logs Error in streaming cpp [not_found]. Tab completely broken. Indexing never completes.

description: Code suggestions stopped appearing after clearing settings.json
notes: Chat works fine but Tab suggestions gone. Clearing settings only fixes temporarily. Intermittent.

description: Tab completion hallucinating suggestions aggressively with no context
notes: Overly aggressive suggestions when no context available. Previously accurate for refactoring — now unreliable.

description: Tab complete shows suggestion but pressing Tab does nothing — or deletes 5-20 unrelated lines
notes: Must type something first to accept suggestion. When it does accept — deletes unrelated code below cursor. Data loss risk.

description: Agent/editor mode switch button broken — no way to switch back without CMD+E
notes: Button changes label but doesn't switch modes. Workaround exists (CMD+E) but UX is broken.

description: Agent deletes files on repeated edits — not intentional deletion but a write bug
notes: Since update 2.1.50 repeated edits to same file result in file deletion. Bug in Cursor file write mechanism.

description: Cursor reliably crashes every time Agent mode edits a file
notes: Reproducible: new folder cleared history all extensions disabled. UI freezes moment Agent edits any file. 100% repro.

description: Agent/editor view selection applies to ALL open Cursor windows — not per-window
notes: Switching to agent view in one window forces all other open windows to switch too. Breaks multi-project workflows.

description: Agent edits files without accessing them in user mode — bypasses confirmation
notes: Agent auto-creates/edits files using markdown code block syntax without user confirmation. Security concern.

description: Agent mode applies file changes directly to disk with no diff UI or Accept/Reject controls
notes: After recent update — no red/green diff shown. No Keep/Undo buttons. Changes auto-accepted. Multiple versions affected.
